import { useContext, useMemo } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import EventCard from "../components/EventCard"; import events from "../data/events"; import { AuthContext } from "../context/AuthContext"; import heroImage from "../images/download.jpg"; import "../styles/KUEvents.css"; import "../styles/Home.css"; function Home() { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); const visibleEvents = useMemo(() => { return events.filter((event) => { if (event.visibility === "public") return true; if (event.visibility === "ku-only" && user?.role === "student") return true; return false; }); }, [user]); const categories = [ { id: 1, name: "🎓", title: "Academic", count: 12 }, { id: 2, name: "🔬", title: "Research", count: 8 }, { id: 3, name: "💼", title: "Workshop", count: 15 }, { id: 4, name: "🎤", title: "Seminar", count: 10 }, ]; return (
